CustomField.defaultValue: "Credit Card - Visa,Credit Card - Amex,Credit Card - Mastercard"
CustomField.description: The payment methods (from the 'Payment Method' field on the Client Payment object) that are card payments (comma separated). This affects whether the 'Card Type' field is required or not when making tour payments.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The payment methods (from the 'Payment Method' field on the Client Payment object) that are card payments (comma separated). This affects whether the 'Card Type' field is required or not when making tour payments.
CustomField.label: Card Payment Methods
